violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. FMC to re-instate once food safety certificate is obtained. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer and can opener to be cleaned prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026
The kitchen hoods have an accumulation of dust (interior and vents). The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
Refrigerator door gasket on the two-door reach in was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2023
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
